sql_array: CREATE TABLE xml_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data VARCHAR(8000), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT id, xtree_doc(data) AS parse_tree, datatype(data) AS data_type FROM xml_data WHERE data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) OVER(PARTITION BY datatype(xtree_doc(data))) AS count_by_type FROM xml_data;
SELECT id, data, xtree_doc(data) FROM xml_data WHERE datatype(data) = 'http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string' OR data IS NULL;
SELECT id, SUM(CASE WHEN datatype(data) = 'http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#integer' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS integer_count FROM xml_data GROUP BY id HAVING integer_count > 0;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_xml (temp_id INT, temp_data VARCHAR(8000));
SELECT xtree_doc(temp_data) FROM temp_xml WHERE temp_data LIKE '<xml>%';
SELECT a.id, b.data, datatype(a.data) FROM xml_data a JOIN xml_data b ON xtree_doc(a.data) IS NOT NULL AND b.id = a.id ORDER BY a.id;
INSERT INTO xml_data (id, data) VALUES (3, null);
SELECT id, xtree_doc(COALESCE(data, '<root><element>Default</element></root>')) AS parse_tree FROM xml_data;
SELECT datatype(data), COUNT(*) FROM xml_data GROUP BY datatype(data) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
